name: Ulusoy Un Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Ulusoy Un Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells wheat flour in Turkey. It offers chapati, biscuit, bread, noodle, and soft noodle flour products; and products for high gluten aqua feed and aqua feed, as well as home use products. The company exports its wheat flour to 72 countries in 5 continents from Far East to the Caribbean Islands covering Africa and the Middle East countries. Ulusoy Un Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Samsun, Turkey.
